title: Aldi Luxury Hotel Collection Reed Diffuser No 1 Lime,Basil & Mandarin,100 ml (Pack of 1)
features: Aldi No. 1 Hotel Collection Lime, Basil & Mandarin glass bottle 100ml
A refreshing scent of juicy lime and twist of mandarin with the warmth of basil, patchouli, and amber at the heart.
contains 100ml lasts for up to 2 months (glass bottle)
description: Product description Aldi No. 1 Hotel Collection Lime, Basil & Mandarin glass bottle 100ml Directions 1. Remove the diffuser from its packaging. 2. Place bottle in an upright position. 3. Insert reeds into bottle. 4. Flip every few days to refresh scent. Safety Warning Do not use the product on the skin or near eyes and mouth. Keep the product out of reach of children and pets. Make sure the room is well ventilated when the product is used. Legal Disclaimer Unscrew the collar,remove the bottle stopper and replace the collar, insert the reeds through the collar and immerse in the oil.turn the reeds after 6-8 hours and the fragrance will fully bloom within 36 hours.keep product upright in a secure place.avoid contact with pointed & polished surfaces,plastic, fabrics,and other materials as they may be harmed and wipe up any spillage immediately.do not use for purpose other than originally intended do not light sticks and avoid excess heat and flames.
